## 3. Description of the Deviation

- The required control or process.
- The actual or proposed activity.
- How the activity differs from the charter.
- Whether the deviation has already occurred.
- Whether production use is affected.

## 7. Impact Assessment

Assess the deviation's potential effect on:

- Model methodology.
- Model assumptions.
- Margin calculations.
- Portfolio coverage.
- Model performance.
- Validation scope.
- Independent reproduction.
- Finding severity or closure.
- Approval criteria.
- Monitoring requirements.
- Existing compensating controls.
- Revalidation requirements.
- Production use.

Impact assessment:

-

## 12. Independent-Validator Assessment

Assess whether the deviation:

| Assessment area | Result | Explanation |
|---|---|---|
| Impairs independence | Yes / No | |
| Restricts validation scope | Yes / No | |
| Prevents independent reproduction | Yes / No | |
| Weakens evidence preservation | Yes / No | |
| Affects findings | Yes / No | |
| Affects model approval | Yes / No | |
| Requires model-use restrictions | Yes / No | |
| Requires revalidation | Yes / No | |
| Requires escalation | Yes / No | |
| Involves a prohibited deviation | Yes / No | |

Validator assessment:

- 

Validator recommendation:

- Approve.
- Approve with conditions.
- Reject.
- Escalate for additional review.
- Issue a formal finding.
- Require partial revalidation.
- Require full revalidation.
- Suspend model use.

## 14. Emergency-Deviation Review

|---|---|
| Emergency condition | |
| Reason prior approval was not obtained | |
| Immediate action taken | |
| Temporary controls | |

## 15. Closure Assessment

Confirm whether:

| Closure requirement | Result | Evidence reference |
|---|---|---|
| Deviation ended | Pending | |
| Required remediation completed | Pending | |
| Compensating controls operated effectively | Pending | |
| Required monitoring completed | Pending | |
| Model-use restrictions observed | Pending | |
| Supporting evidence sufficient | Pending | |
| Related findings addressed | Pending | |
| Residual risk addressed | Pending | |

Closure conclusion:

- Closure approved.
- Closure rejected.
- Additional remediation required.
- Deviation expired but remains unresolved.

| Field | Entry |
|---|---|
| Independent validator | |
| Closure authority | |
| Closure date | |
